title: leucanthemum monspeliense var. ruscinonense
intro: Leucanthemum monspeliense var. ruscinonense, also known as the Ruscin oxeye daisy, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum monspeliense var. ruscinonense include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
